nasb.text: You shall not see your countryman’s donkey or his ox fallen down on the way, and pay no attention to them; you shall certainly help him to raise them up.

esv.text: You shall not see your brother’s donkey or his ox fallen down by the way and ignore them. You shall help him to lift them up again.

cnv.text: 如果你看見你兄弟的驢或牛跌倒在路上，你不可不理，總要幫助他把牠們拉起來。

ccb.text: 如果在路上看见同胞的牛或驴倒在地上，不可视而不见，要帮忙把它扶起来。
